payload.title: Deploy hardening: first-boot init on fresh volume + correct fly.toml volume semantics
payload.description: Two Milestone-A deploy gaps: (1) the container runs `scope serve`, which requires an initialized .scope at SCOPE_DIR; on a fresh Fly volume it is empty, so the entrypoint must `scope init` if missing. (2) In Milestone A (no Postgres) the /data volume holds the CANONICAL event log, but fly.toml's comment calls it a disposable cache — misleading and dangerous (someone could destroy real data). Fix the entrypoint + the comment, and document backup.
